scripts.build: npm run build:types && npm run build:runtime
scripts.build:runtime: npm run build:lib:runtime && npm run build:cli
scripts.build:lib:runtime: npm run build:lib:esm && npm run build:lib:cjs
scripts.build:cli: esbuild cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --loader:.hbs=text --external:fsevents --alias:react-devtools-core=./scripts/devtools-stub.mjs --define:process.env.NODE_ENV=\"production\" --banner:js="import { createRequire as __createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = __createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/cli.mjs
scripts.linux-x64: npm run build:cli && bun build dist/cli.mjs --compile --sourcemap=inline --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile build/revenexx-linux-x64
scripts.linux-arm64: npm run build:cli && bun build dist/cli.mjs --compile --sourcemap=inline --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile build/revenexx-linux-arm64
scripts.mac-x64: npm run build:cli && bun build dist/cli.mjs --compile --sourcemap=inline --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile build/revenexx-darwin-x64
scripts.mac-arm64: npm run build:cli && bun build dist/cli.mjs --compile --sourcemap=inline --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile build/revenexx-darwin-arm64
scripts.windows-x64: npm run build:cli && bun build dist/cli.mjs --compile --sourcemap=inline --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile build/revenexx-win-x64.exe
scripts.windows-arm64: npm run build:cli && pkg dist/cli.mjs -t node22-win-arm64 -o build/revenexx-win-arm64.exe
